channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Uplift: Ellie the Elephant
item.description: Meet Big Ellie, the elephant mascot of the WNBA's New York Liberty, along with other uplifting stories.

item.title: DOJ lawyer states in court filing that 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' is not proceeding
item.description: A DOJ attorney said in a court filing Friday that the Trump administration's Anti-Weaponization Fund has not been established and is no longer moving forward.

item.title: Graham Platner faces fresh controversy days before Maine Senate primary
item.description: This week, the New York Times reported allegations of Platner's unsettling behavior toward women he dated, including a claim of physical aggression.

item.title: No bags, no watch parties: What to expect when Trump attends NBA Finals
item.description: As President Trump prepares to watch the New York Knicks face the San Antonio Spurs at Madison Square Garden, officials are planning heightened security.
